creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Probably not related, but games/oolite port can't be tested on aarch64 because of broken lang/gnustep-base dependency (there is BROKEN_aarch64 message since ports r473012 changes):
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-pkg-fallout/Week-of-Mon-20180618/812808.html

There was a new patch for lang/gnustep-base in ports r480741 (bug #230116), but BROKEN_aarch64 message wasn't removed. Therefore games/oolite port was skipped for aarch64 poudriere builds with current "gnustep-base-1.25.0_7" reason:
http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=112arm64-default&build=483081#skipped

and "is marked as broken on aarch64: fails to compile: :1:27: unexpected token in argument list" reason for lang/gnustep-base port: 
http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=112arm64-default&build=483081#ignored

(In reply to comment #13)
> Release PR to unblock progress.
Anyway, thanks for your attention.

I think, this PR can be Closed/Rejected after 2 weeks of inactivity, because there were no successful test results from other people since December 2017 (about 1 year ago).
